name: vibe-replay-monorepo
description: Turn AI coding sessions into animated, interactive web replays

scripts.build: pnpm --filter @vibe-replay/viewer build && mkdir -p packages/cli/assets && cp packages/viewer/dist/index.html packages/cli/assets/viewer.html && pnpm --filter vibe-replay build
scripts.build:website: pnpm --filter @vibe-replay/viewer build && mkdir -p website/public/view && cp packages/viewer/dist/index.html website/public/view/index.html && pnpm --filter @vibe-replay/website build
